Title: Phase4B.Dev3.Mobily - Verify Auto-Cancellation of Mobily Activation Order (UAT Counter > 3 / Max Timeout Exceeded)

Step Action: Force trigger the UAT Timer expiry
Step Expected: Telflow evaluates the condition uatCounter > 3 and bypasses the 'Handle UAT Timer Expiry' node

Step Action: Navigate to Telflow Portal (NSP) and verify the Order Status.
Step Expected: Order state transitions directly to Assessing Cancellation, then Pending Cancellation

Step Action: Check Southbound Logs / System Tab to verify NFO Rollback.
Step Expected: TMF 641 request is successfully sent to Nokia FlowOne with @type = Cease and action = Deactive

Step Action:
Simulate NFO Rollback Completion by sending ServiceOrderStateChangeEvent from NFO.
- state: "completed"
- stateMessage: "REQUEST COMPLETED"
Step Expected: Telflow accepts the NFO rollback completion response

Step Action: Check Southbound Logs to verify Inventory and WFM Rollback.
Step Expected: Telflow sends Update Inventory (RETURN) request to MapleWave.

Step Action: Verify the final Action API updates sent to SingleView.
Step Expected: Telflow sends Close CPE Action (and Close ME Action if applicable) to SingleView

Step Action: Monitor final state transition in Telflow Portal.
Step Expected: Final Order state = CANCELLED

Title: Phase4B.Dev3.Mobily - Verify Auto-Cancellation in Open Access (STC) FTTH During Activation order

Step Action:
Simulate STC Installation Failure by sending serviceOrderStateChangeNotification to Telflow.
Example Payload:
- providerStatus: "ORDERED"
- reasonCode: "B166-OLO"
- reasonText: "B166-OLO - Commercial Site"
Step Expected: API returns HTTP 200 OK

Step Action: Check System Tab to verify Telflow initiates the Treatment process.
Step Expected: Telflow successfully sends the mapped Action API request to SingleView.

Step Action: Monitor the Order State transition in the Telflow Portal.
Step Expected: Order state transitions from IN PROGRESS / On Hold to Assessing Cancellation, and then Pending Cancellation.

Step Action: Check System Tab to verify Rollback execution towards STC.
Step Expected: Cancel Service Installation Request is successfully sent to STC

Step Action: Simulate STC Cancellation Completion by sending the async notification from STC.
Step Expected: Telflow successfully accepts the STC rollback completion response.

Step Action: Monitor the final state transition in the Telflow Portal and verify final TMF 622 notification.
Step Expected:
Final Order state = CANCELLED
TMF 622 Notification sent to SV with state = cancelled.

Title: Phase4B.Dev3.Mobily - Verify Auto-Cancellation of Mobily Activation Order (UAT Counter <= 3 with Customer Rejection)

Step Action: Force trigger the UAT Timer expiry
Step Expected: Telflow evaluates uatCounter <= 3 and enters the 'Handle UAT Timer Expiry' node

Step Action: Check Southbound Logs / System Tab to verify SV Action creation.
Step Expected: Telflow sends a POST request to SingleView to create an Action with type: "Contact Customer for UAT"

Step Action: Simulate SingleView synchronous success response.
Step Expected: Telflow accepts the response and stores the returned actionId.

Step Action:
Simulate Customer Rejection by triggering ActionNotificationEvent from SingleView (via Bruno) 
Payload criteria:
-resolutionCode: "1"
-resolutionText: "Cancel Order"
Step Expected: API returns HTTP 200 OK The 'Trigger AutoCancellation' node evaluates to Yes

Step Action: Navigate to Telflow Portal (NSP) and verify the Order Status.
Step Expected: Order state transitions to Assessing Cancellation, then Pending Cancellation

Step Action: Check Southbound Logs / System Tab to verify NFO Rollback.
Step Expected: TMF 641 request is successfully sent to NFO with @type = Cease and action = Deactivate

Step Action:
Simulate NFO Rollback Completion by sending ServiceOrderStateChangeEvent from NFO.
- state: "completed"
- stateMessage: "REQUEST COMPLETED"
Step Expected: Telflow accepts the NFO rollback completion response.

Step Action: Check Southbound Logs to verify Inventory and WFM Rollback.
Step Expected: Telflow sends Update Inventory (RETURN) request to MapleWave.

Step Action: Monitor final state transition in Telflow Portal.
Step Expected: Final Order state = CANCELLED

Title: Phase4B.Dev3.Mobily - Verify Auto-Cancellation of Mobily during Relocation Order

Step Action: Simulate Mobily WFM Device Swap Failure by sending workOrderStateChangeNotification
Step Expected: API returns HTTP 200 OK

Step Action: Navigate to Telflow Portal (NSP) and verify the Order Status.
Step Expected: Order state transitions automatically to IN PROGRESS / On Hold.

Step Action: Force trigger or wait for the 'X' days Treatment Resolution Timeout SLA to expire without resolving the action.
Step Expected: Telflow SLA Timer expires automatically.

Step Action: Monitor the Order flow progression based on the BPMN gateway.
Step Expected: The Auto-Cancellation Triggered? gateway evaluates to Yes.

Step Action: Verify the final Action API requests sent by Telflow back to SingleView.
Step Expected: Telflow sends a Close Relocation Action request to SingleView via the rollback handler.

Step Action: Monitor the final state transition in the Telflow Portal.
Step Expected: The flow executes the Set Status Cancelled and terminates the Order.
